Interface IRasterConvolutionFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster kernel-based filter.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("64DB07DF-FC21-4C9A-8441-7CB9791855EA")]
public interface IRasterConvolutionFilter

Properties

GainFactor

The gain factor of the kernel filter.

double GainFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

IsNormalized

Indicates whether the filter is normalized.

bool IsNormalized { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Recursive

Indicates whether the filter is recursive.

bool Recursive { get; set; }

bool
